response.justification: The candidate has extensive full-stack and embedded software experience but lacks demonstrable expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their work centers on web, mobile, and GIS applications with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and contribute to open-source infrastructure tools
Demonstrated leadership in dev-ops, CI/CD, and technical education
concerns: No evidence of SoC, IP, or AI accelerator hardware modeling experience
Lacks background in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
No mention of performance analysis, power-optimization trade-offs, or hardware-software co-design
